programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Purchase a good steak and cook it properly, and all it needs is salt and pepper—and, of course, a side of spuds. We wanted potatoes with perfect texture and big flavor—something unusual to accompany a great steak and a good bottle of wine.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Restaurant steak tips are often tough and weirdly seasoned, and thick steak fries can be pale and soggy. The test kitchen felt confident that we could rescue these dishes and turn them into something you would welcome into your home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Preparing favorite French dishes such as cassoulet or tarte Tatin calls for a lot of patience and time. We wondered if we could find ways to simplify these recipes without sacrificing the qualities that make them classics.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Few recipes deliver so much pleasure for so little work as pancakes. The batter comes together in minutes, and the cooking time is brief. Why, then, do most Americans never make pancakes from scratch?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although easy to prepare, most cookie recipes are notoriously fickle. A minor ingredient change or fluctuation in oven temperature can yield unexpected results. Our goal was simple: Take two favorite cookies and develop reliable recipes that taste great.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We especially like to use summer berries in a no-bake pie. We wanted a no-bake pie that was every bit as appealing as a traditional double-crust pie—without all of the work.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen decided to tackle two popular sheet cakes—carrot and chocolate—and produce simple recipes that would deliver superior results.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Although some would never dare to adulterate plain cheesecake, variations abound—some good, some bad, some ugly. We wanted our cheesecake to be both light and creamy, with great lemon flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When entertaining, we like desserts that look more complicated to prepare than they really are. A chocolate mousse cake or chilled lemon soufflé requires basic ingredients but is sure to elicit the proper oohs and aahs from guests.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We like appetizers that deliver big flavor without much work. This means spiced nuts that are not overly sweet, spinach dip that is bold and creamy (not watery and insipid), and beef satay that is tender and vibrant.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most cooks are under the impression that good soup takes all day to prepare. We'll show you how to make simplified versions of two favorite soups: chicken noodle and Italian pasta and bean.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Soup for supper is an appealing concept, especially on a cold night. But for soup to work as a main course, it better be hearty. Our vibrant lentil soup fits the bill, and we round out this meal with quick cheese bread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some local dishes become so popular that they transcend their region. Gumbo is a taste of Louisiana in a big old bowl. And Cincinnati chili is American original, served with buttered spaghetti, kidney beans, cheddar cheese, and chopped onions.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: It sometimes seems the simplest recipes suffer the worst fate in modern cookbooks. The test kitchen was committed to breathing new life into these old-fashioned American recipes: stuffed pork chops, gravy, and glazed carrots.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We offer two inspired takes on roast chicken. Our roast lemon chicken ends with a twist. And there's nothing conventional about cooking a butterflied chicken under a brick. But these two recipes both deliver crisp skin and lots of flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Quick and easy weeknight cooking can still yield great results. We start with two quick-cooking classics— sautéed chicken cutlets and pan-seared shrimp—and elevate them from the everyday.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we offer delicious, relatively straightforward fare that appeals to young and old. What kid—or adult—doesn't look forward to macaroni and cheese or barbecued chicken?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We take some of our favorite restaurant recipes—Crab Towers and Flambéed Pan-Roasted Lobster—and show you how to make them work in a home kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Huge meaty flavor—combined with spice, smoke, and fire—epitomizes Texas barbecue. Could we figure out how to make authentic Texas beef ribs in our Boston-based test kitchen?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On occasion, we break the bank and buy a beef tenderloin. The tender, buttery interior is the big draw, and the combination of a healthy dose of seasoning and the flavor from the grill is a perfect solution to an otherwise mild-tasting piece of meat.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare grilled chicken with a sweet-and-sour dipping sauce and grilled salmon with a sweet, sticky glaze.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare chicken enchiladas and Mexican rice.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sure, raw tomato sauces are fast, but if the sauce is watery and bland, who cares? Likewise, asparagus-based pasta sauces are often bland and boring. In this episode, we keep things simple while avoiding these common problems.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen prepares two Indian favorites: chicken biryani and mulligatawny soup.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.desc: A dispute between Mitch's lifeguard career and his father's desire to have him take over the family architecture business becomes intensified by devastating news about the elder Buchannon.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ and Stephanie travel to Catalina Island for a "girls-only” weekend getaway, only to be distracted by two handsome men, leading to a life and death encounter. When Mitch and Hobie hire a gorgeous Swedish au pair, amorous complications ensue.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Stephanie cope with an odd assembly of UFO enthusiasts camping on the beach in anticipation of an extraterrestrial visitation. Smugglers threaten Summer to recover diamonds they hid inside a surfboard Slade gave her.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An escaped psychopath takes Summer and Stephanie hostage in a lifeguard tower, necessitating a thrilling subterranean rescue attempt by Mitch and Matt.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch finds himself falling for an Italian actress who is being stalked by ruthless robbers. Meanwhile, CJ and Stephanie help Guido pretend to be a lifeguard in order to impress his visiting mother.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When he risks his life to save three teenagers, Mitch fractures his spine and is paralyzed. Hobie, Stephanie, and Sophie, his physical therapist, rally to repair his shattered life.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch contends with an unorthodox, risk-taking Australian lifeguard, and rekindles his love affair with a beautiful journalist, Kaye Morgan.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: One of the most asked about guests on Dr. Phil returns--Brandon! Plus, a desperate family turns to Dr. Phil to save their daughter who is addicted to OxyContin and heroin.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pageant mom Lori & daugther Alaska, 9, made news bleaching the girl's teeth & dyeing her eyelashes. Alaska's pic posted on TheDirty.com, with a man's claim he performed a sexual act while looking at the photo. Plus, Brittany, 21, had sex with a 14-yr-old.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After former friends Randi & Haley tell Brittany's history of harassing men & faking pregnancies, Dr. Phil talks to Brittany and asks her to prove she is pregnant. What sent Brittany storming off stage? See the backstage conversation with Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with husband and wife, Nathan and April, who claim a woman named Ashley is fixated on their beautiful twin daughters and continuously posts pictures of them online, posing as their mother! How will Ashley react when confronted? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robert, a retired professor, says he began dating as his 40-year marriage unraveled. Wife Jeremi says Robert spent their $1 million savings on day trading and giving money to women, who she insists are catfish. Dr. Phil finds out what is going on. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Every parent can tell you that raising a child is often demanding, thankless, hard work. But when a teenager gets pregnant and has a child, the result can be stress and chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kala Brown continues to tell her story of captivity by a serial killer. She claims her alleged abductor hoped she would one day fall in love with him. Inside her fight to survive and her dramatic rescue. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sandi, 60, will soon be flying to Nigeria to marry her soul mate & fiancé Peter, 22, but her three adult daughters say not if they can stop her. Sandi's daughters also say they fear Peter's "sister" is a girlfriend or wife. Peter insists he loves Sandi.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Monster-In-Law Khalood last met with Dr. Phil, she wanted her lazy kids out of her house and invited Dr. Phil to her home to prove her claims. Dr. Phil takes Khalood up on her offer, and gets a firsthand look at what’s going on behind closed doors!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents are bombarded with the dangers kids can fall prey: molesters, cyber-stalkers, drugs & bullies. But how far to go to ensure your child's safety? Where do you draw the line between hovering over your children & giving them enough freedom?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a parent's worst nightmare to learn their child was sexually abused, especially in their own home. Patty says her world ended the day she learned her husband was sexually abusing her 3 daughters. What warning signs did she miss?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tiffany says her relationship with her son's dad, Erik, was destroyed by constant lies & empty promises; she cut him off completely. Erik admits he's lied to his ex-girlfriends. Same with Sheka, who stopped wedding plans. Will more women come forward?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With over 1 billion views across social media platforms, 17-year-old Jack says he'll do almost anything for a "like" and is known for posting outlandish pranks, and "Karen" videos. But how far is too far? Jack's parents fear for Jack's future.

programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale casts Dash Riprock as Homer Noodleman, a potential new lover for Elly May.

programme.desc: The Clampetts prepare to go to Hooterville for Christmas.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is sick, and Dr. Granny springs into action with a chimp as a nurse. But Ellie's bear Fairchild has taken a liking to granny's flu remedy. During this, Mrs. Drysdale tries to impress society Mrs. Van Ransonhoff.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is evicted because his 50 cent allowance won't cover the rent. The other Clampetts take over the space with Granny will cut hair or pull teeth. Jed will sharpen tools and whittle something. Ellie is the pretty receptionist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the Clampetts established in business in Jethro's vacated office space, a building inspector visits to find out about their business operations on the 5th floor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sam Drucker comes to Beverly Hills to visit, and Granny assumes he's interested in courting her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro meets Mrs. Drysdale's guru and decides he wants to be one also. Granny thinks it's all nonsense, but when she tries to put a stop to it the followers find her common sense inspiring and make her the head guru.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Drysdales now jog so the banker can get the account of Jason Detweiler, head of a running club. The Clampetts don't understand the concept, leading to misunderstandings, then Ellie and Jethro become enthusiastic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Famous singer Pat Boone is in the neighborhood and smells Granny's cooking. He wanders into their backyard and the Clampetts befriend him, thinking he's a hill country man down on his luck.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The hillbillies move back to the hills to find Elly May a husband, much to the dismay of banker Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny continues her efforts to get Elly May married, extolling the young girl's virtues to every bachelor she meets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Granny insists she doesn't need glasses, although she carries on a conversation with a pet seal, thinking it's Elly's new boyfriend.

programme.desc: Shorty Kellems, proprietor of the hotel in Silver Dollar, sells out and leaves the hills to join the Clampetts in California.

programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale's nephew, who possesses a wealth of confidence but no talent, takes over Drysdale's private office at his Beverly Hills Bank.

programme.desc: The Clampetts visit Hooterville and Jed arranges to go into the airline business with pilot Steve Elliott.

programme.desc: Jed Clampett and Shad Heller conspire to line up Shorty Kellems as a husband for the strong-minded widow, Elverna Bradshaw.

programme.desc: Kelly learns that she is pregnant. Val makes a pass at David, prompting Donna to order him to end their working relationship. Clare is saddened by Mother's Day, so Steve tries to take her mind off things by going for a drive.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon is heartbroken when Kelly is unable to remember their relationship. Valerie helps organize Donna when she has trouble keeping track of her clients. Donna decides to make Val her business partner.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly moves back into the beach apartment. A designer offers to purchase Donna's work. David manages a rock band and allows the lead singer to crash at the apartment.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Donna discover that Rush owns the building that houses the sweatshop. David's credit problems escalate. Kelly fails to identify the shooter from the police lineup.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Erica is arrested for prostitution and released into Kelly and Brandon's custody. Jodi claims that Steve is the only man who could have possibly fathered her child. Mel helps David file for bankruptcy and pay back Donna.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon is arrested for obstructing justice. David moves into the office at the After Dark and accidentally starts a fire. Valerie visits Sands and learns that Noah paid off David's debt.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly considers filing sexual harassment charges against Monahan, but does not want to interfere with a fundraiser for the clinic. Val and David realize how much they mean to each other.

programme.desc: Dr. Monahan forces Kelly out of the clinic. Brandon and Steve hire a new assistant, Janet Sosna; and bring David aboard as a music reviewer. Valerie cuts a deal with a bookie operating at the After Dark.

programme.desc: Agent Neil Shaw returns in the no holds barred action adventure sequel. When Shaw is called out of retirement as a Hollywood film consultant by the murder of his long-time martial arts mentor, 'Mother.'

programme.title: The Art of War III: Retribution
programme.desc: When international diplomacy comes up short, extreme measures must be taken. In the newest installment of Art of War, Agent Neil Shaw is on a covert mission to stop North Korean terrorists from obtaining a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: An inspirational account of basketball coach Ken Carter, who received both praise and criticism when he made headlines for benching his entire undefeated team for poor academic performance.

programme.title: Paid in Full
programme.desc: A young man from Harlem, forced to cope with the 1980s drug scene, builds an illegal empire, only to have a crisis of conscience. Featuring the hit soundtrack with songs by Eric B. & Rakim, Boogie Down Productions, Guy, and Jay-Z.

programme.title: The Wood
programme.desc: Lots of guys have second thoughts about marriage. Three hours before his wedding, Roland is having third, fourth and fifth thoughts. Good thing he’s got buddies Slim and Mike around to help.

programme.title: Juice
programme.desc: Q. Raheem. Bishop. Steel. They're four Harlem friends who spend their days hanging out and looking for a way to get the power and respect they call Juice. Q hopes to earn respect by becoming a scratch 'n' mix DJ.

programme.title: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Officer Cole is assigned to infiltrate the syndicate of God, a deadly crime lord. But as Cole sinks deeper into God's crew, he begins to get in over his head, until the line that separates his true identity from his street persona begins to disappear.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: The Emerson family worries that Joey is being unfaithful to his girlfriend when they discover that he's dating a white woman and a black woman at the same time.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Eleanor and Roc try to put some of the romance back into their marriage.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Roc and Eleanor invite their homeless friend, Linda, to the house for dinner and she immediately develops a mutual attraction with their neighbor, 'Crazy' George.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: The Emerson family is shocked to learn that Andrew is dating a young woman who looks exactly like his deceased wife.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When 'The Downtown Divas' return from a European singing tour, one of the 'Divas' asks Roc to help prevent a local drug dealer from murdering her brother.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Roc is arrested for shooting a local drug dealer but maintains his innocence despite Detective Rush trying to force a confession out of him.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Calvin asks Roc to care for his daughter, Sheila, after he is convicted of attempted murder.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When Roc's crazy neighbor, George, is hired by the Sanitation Department, Roc is assigned to teach the annoying man how to be a garbage collector.
Mary and Lester are shocked when his cousin Ed's enviable 'picture-perfect' marriage suddenly falls apart.

When Mary and Sandra go to court to settle a dispute over song royalties, Sandra's ammunition is veteran 'barrister' John Houseman, while Mary's ace in the hole is a 'Supreme' expert witness, singer Mary Wilson.
Mayhem and murder plague 227 when a mysterious man with a knife rents an apartment in Mary's building.

When Mary and Lester go to the reading of his uncle's will, they are both surprised to learn they have distant cousins whom they've never met, and even more confused when they discover they are a different color.
When Lester's old high school sweetheart comes to the neighborhood in search of a new home, Mary fears that she'll try to move in on more than just her turf.
Suffering from a very cold winter spell, the residents of '227' invade Mary and Lester's apartment, which is one of two apartments with heat.
When Mary and Lester's school teacher friend Mitchell meets Sandra, he sets out to win her pampered heart, no matter how many gifts or expensive dates it takes.
After a whirlwind courtship, Sandra accepts Mitchell's wedding proposal, making a commitment to trade in her glamorous life for what she not-so-long-ago considered a boring existence.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont and Rollo mistakenly go to a gay bar. Fred's friend Bubba sees them go into the bar and tells Fred that his son is gay. Fred refuses to believe it. Later, Fred and Bubba decide to investigate the bar to see why Lamont went.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont and Julio go into the used auto parts business and drive Fred to skid row. Fred thinks Lamont's new venture means his son is deserting their partnership, so he moves into a skid row mission to make Lamont feel bad.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: It takes some doing to convince Fred to make his first airplane flight. An inheritance left to Fred by a late uncle doesn't seem reason enough to fly -- even for the money-hungry Fred.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred succumbs to Donna's pressures and agrees to get married, but his family has other ideas. Fred and Donna plan to wed in a private ceremony at the Sanford home and Lamont uses this as a ploy to try to get rid of Donna.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Following the advice of his son Lamont, Fred donates a collection of rare jazz albums to a music library in order to get a tax write-off, but he wants them back when he finds they are valued at $500.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont buys Fred a pool table for a birthday gift and Fred's buddies turn the Sanford home into a pool hall. With the pool table in, the junk business is out and so is Donna, Fred's fiancée.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Always trying to make a buck, Fred talks Lamont into letting Grady become a 'paying' boarder in their home. But it looks like Fred is the one paying the price.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Making chaos out of Louise's arrangements to take a troubled orphan for a week is child's play for George. George's success getting the little girl to open up and speak turns to trouble when he puts a few of his words into her mouth.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: All the preparations for Jenny's baby leave Florence wanting a child to bolster her own womanhood and sends her 'husband hunting.' Florence joins a dating club to find a man to help her start a family.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Louise and Florence, leaving George begging for Florence's services and heading an important social evening toward disaster. Louise and Florence's fight serves to air long-standing aggravations between them.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A television documentary on Louise's success with the suicide hotline could lead to a deadly failure. Louise gets so involved in preparing for her television appearance she fails to notice a desperate need.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Quani and Puma are officially "turned up", causing them to miss the Black Ink photo shoot. O'S**t heads to court to find out the outcome of his gun charge. Quani curses out Ceaser, causing a full-blown riot on the streets of Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The pressure is on for Ceaser when Dutchess' parents arrive for their engagement party. Quani and Puma make it clear that this war isn't over. Sky struggles with the emotions she feels over leaving Tent City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky is freed from Tent City andTed is waiting outside for her. When Kathie has DNA results in hand, O'Sh*t deals with his past. Puma creates a plan to protect his family but results in a full-out brawl on the streets of New York City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of the fashion show incident, the crew works on rebuilding and proving that they are stronger than ever before. When Sassy shows up, Ceaser makes it clear that anyone associated with Puma is not allowed on his turf. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When Donna speaks her mind one too many times for Ceaser's liking, he sends her packing. A customer appreciation (aka mixxxy) field trip to a water park ends in fireworks when Sky finds out that Ted has been messing around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of Puma's devastating loss of Ink 124, Ceaser meets with Med, who gives him the offer of a lifetime. Now, Ceaser finds himself torn between his inevitable and dreaded move to North Carolina, and the chance to run Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser finds himself looking for a house in North Carolina. Daddy Rick fires up the grill for some good old Southern hospitality, and for Ceaser, the pressure is on. Back in Harlem, Sky checks in with Puma and tells him to man up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After turning down a dream offer, Ceaser questions the person he is becoming. Sky talks to a friend and figures out a way to find closure with a heartbreaking piece of her past. Dutchess is shocked when Ceaser asks for a prenup. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of the prenup ask, Dutchess and Ceaser discuss ownership of Black Ink. Quani visits with Tamia and Puma realizes that the distant is hurting his family. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna is finally given her shot at tattooing but struggles with her emotions over devastating news. Shit's new fling, Blue, comes in with a little stick that holds big news and has O S**t thinking about his future. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew throws down for a mixxxy party, and when a shocking video is played, Kathie loses it. Puma reveals some big news to Quani and asks her to come home to New York. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the first ever Black Ink Crew Reunion, host Big Tigger reunites the cast for an exclusive mixxy party to relive three seasons of drama and air each others' dirty laundry.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After leaving Black Ink closed for a month, Ceaser is back in Harlem. In North Carolina, Dutchess still has to pay for unexpected renovations before her tattoo shop can open. Kathie warns O'Sh*t about child support payments.

programme.desc: Ceaser's arrest sends shock waves through Black Ink. Puma is opening up a brand new tattoo shop to give Black Ink a run for its money. All hell breaks loose when Ted hires a new tattoo artist behind Ceaser's back.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (CBS TV (LF))

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un querido comandante de la Armada que entrenó a algunos de los mejores atletas del país.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un hombre en un crucero cuyo cuerpo es descubierto en la sauna del barco por la suegra de McGee.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Fuerza excesiva
programme.desc: Frank debe decidir si defiende a su hijo Danny, acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, o la reputación de la policía. Jamie se conecta con una doctora después de llevar a un indigente al hospital.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Habladora
programme.desc: Jamie es atacado por un matón vengativo después de intervenir en su relación abusiva con su novia. Frank enfrenta un escándalo político por comentarios insensibles de Henry que fueron grabados ilegalmente y filtrados a la prensa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El más buscado
programme.desc: Frank y Danny buscan encarcelar a un delincuente internacional que siempre se libra de cargos por asesinato, pero les falta evidencia para una condena. Erin considera dejar su trabajo para ejercer en la práctica privada.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Mata al mensajero
programme.desc: Frank se sorprende en una entrevista en vivo cuando él y el fiscal interino discrepan sobre un tema. Danny y su nuevo jefe chocan en sus métodos y personalidades mientras investigan un tiroteo desde un auto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y McGee se dirigen a Alaska mientras el equipo trabaja en casa para descubrir la conspiración detrás del asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un comandante de la marina tras la repentina explosión del cadáver antes de que Jimmy pudiera examinarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un querido comandante de la Armada que entrenó a algunos de los mejores atletas del país.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo investiga la muerte de un hombre en un crucero cuyo cuerpo es descubierto en la sauna del barco por la suegra de McGee.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while driving around a known drug zone looking to score and the boyfriend is arrested for an outstanding warrant. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick, and Nick find the body of two women at a construction site buried under tar. The swing shift is brought into the world of foreign mail-order brides.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofia, Sara, and Greg investigate the disappearance of a woman coming home from a night out with a friend after her abandoned car is found on the edge of a highway.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a major Las Vegas player is found dead, Ecklie orders both teams to investigate the case. The man who had secrets on everyone in Vegas had a very big one of his own.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Warrick investigate a badly mutilated body in the woods. Grissom, Sarah, and Greg try to determine how a man was killed in a hotel room. It leads them to a convention of big women.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A serial killer strikes again, and the CSI team tries new technology using evidence from a prior killing.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: One night, four cases. Grissom and Brass get a stolen hummer and a taco stand. Warrick gets a dead car showgirl. Sara and Greg get a dead bodybuilder. Nick gets a dead boy found on a bench.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass travels to Hollywood, California to try to track down his estranged daughter's friend, meanwhile trying to rekindle some kind of relationship with her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a mental-hospital patient and quickly narrow down the suspects to a handful of other patients and staff members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un cazador de fantasmas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Russell y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos, uno de los suyos se enfrenta al peligro en una arriesgada misión encubierta para acercarse al asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se apresura a encontrar a Morgan y a Ellie Brass después de su secuestro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar un asesinato y un robo en un juego de póquer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un incendio en un concierto musical.

programme.title: Fama

programme.title: Robocop 2

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)

programme.title: Alfie

programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Florida discover that male chauvinistic pigs come in all colors when Florida's husband demands she stops working for white people.

programme.desc: Dressed in a German uniform for a mission, Carter finds himself serving in the German army.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After receiving a tax refund from the IRS, Oliver inspires his fellow citizens to make similar requests. There's only one problem... those making requests haven't paid their taxes! Nevertheless, the IRS mistakenly sends out half a million dollars!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is insistent that he and Lisa have a romantic Sunday afternoon picnic, all alone. His romantic gesture for two turns into a picnic for the entire town. Finally, Oliver finds them a romantic refuge in a most unlikely place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Eb places an ad in a magazine claiming to be a wealthy landowner, it catches the eye of a young socialite. When the young woman makes an unexpected visit to Hooterville, Eb is forced to keep up his ruse.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa play host to four children from the city, who find themselves in Hooterville as part of a rural exposure program. The kids learn how to milk the cow, pick vegetables, plant seeds, and share sleeping quarters with four-legged friends.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three sailors murder a fourth after he double crossed them in a little smuggling operation. The victim's girlfriend witnesses the murder and then tries to hide.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Members of a not-too-legitimate real estate company become victims of a poison contained in a rare shellfish. McGarrett knows that the two men were murdered, but is stumped by the origin of the poison and how it was administered to the victims.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A convicted murderer escapes from prison and threatens to kill his former girlfriend, so McGarrett sets up an elaborate police protective system around the girl in an effort to capture the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A wealthy young widow is one of the victims in an intricate blackmail plot that leads to the murder of a Chicago mobster. During the investigation, McGarrett discovers the blackmail scheme and a plot to rob a Hawaiian bank.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny Williams goes undercover as a sailor to flush out a drug ring operating from a vessel in the U.S. Seventh Fleet.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett seeks a killer whose targets have been wives of army men who have come to Hawaii to meet their husbands on furlough.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett is puzzled when a computer programmed to help solve the slaying of an underworld figure's business associate indicates that the culprit is one of McGarrett's own people — Duke.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sergeant LuAnn Corbin takes temporary custody of an abandoned baby boy found at a crack house after a drive-by shooting is reported in the Bottoms. When the infant’s young mother, a crack addict, comes to reclaim the boy, LuAnn struggles to let go.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes Sparta when a young alcoholic woman, Holly Maynard, kills a child, Denia Larson, in a hit-and-run accident; however, a second and unexpected tragedy sadly follows, which will expose certain tragic failures of the justice system.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Marissa and David, interracial sweethearts at Sparta High School, are targeted by a racist sniper who takes a shot at Marissa. Many people in town assume that David was the real target, because he’s Black, but then why was only one shot taken?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Parker Williams is shocked to find his ex-fiancée, Beverly Ross, at a drug deal, but he’s even more shocked when Beverly accuses him of using excessive force during the arrest. He claims it was self-defense, but Beverly is sticking to her story.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Former madam, Maybelle Cheseboro, has returned to Sparta, but this time with a legitimate phone sex business, instead of a brothel. Meanwhile, a city official, Drew Ward, is linked to the death of Jessica Lund, one of Maybelle’s phone workers.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Chief Forbes starts a boxing program in Sparta to help young men at risk and has taken a special interest in one kid with a lot of promise, Kevin Brooks; however, Forbes soon discovers that Kevin is involved in a series of burglaries in town.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Lieutenant Lonnie Jamison’s wealthy aunt, Cordelia Woodlin, is back in Sparta and spending time with her very old and dear friend, blues singer Ches Collins; that is until Ches starts receiving racist death threats warning him to stay away from her.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is caught in a survival struggle between a young racist condemned for murder and a sheriff.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: A security guard turned thief loses the money he stole, and searches for it with Hunter and McCall in close pursuit.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness who's set to testify before a grand jury.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful model he suspects of complicity in a jewelry robbery.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) teaches a gold hunter that a good turn received indebts a man to perform 10 good turns for others, and that true riches is a matter of the human heart.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Kung fu and karate confront each other in a full-dress showdown as Caine (DAVID CARRADINE), the man of peace, teaches a girl in a crisis in her life that there is no peace without self-respect.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Shackled to a brute of a man thirsting for his enemies' blood, Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) probes the cause of his hatred and leaves him transformed in the wilderness.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) goes manhunting to teach a little girl (JODIE FOSTER) the importance and fragility of human integrity and to heal the wound in her soul after she has saved him from the gallows at the cost of her sense of innocence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg gets Peter to pretend to be an older guy and go with him on a double date, and Mike and Carol prepare to entertain one of Mike's clients from Mexico.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg steals the mascot from his rival school the night before the big game, and Mike tries to help him return it before he gets in big trouble.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia, Jan and Peter each get jobs at the local ice cream parlor, each with varying results.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Bobby saves Peter from potential serious injury after he pushes him out of the way of a falling ladder. A grateful Peter offers to become Bobby's "slave for life," something that Bobby takes quick advantage of.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The rival school's quarterback suddenly takes an interest in Marcia the week of the football game., and Mike is Jealous when Carol's high school sweetheart comes for a visit.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan thinks she' has no talent after not being chosen for a ballet recital, so the family tries to make her feel better and help her find a skill.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike takes the entire family on a trip to King's Island amusement park, where he is to submit plans to a client, but the a mix-up causes the blueprints to go missing at the park.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama puts Bubba in a bind with his boss when she returns a gift that wasn't meant for her and spends the money buying presents for everyone else in the family.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When an ATM gives Mama $800 without charging her account, the family agrees she should keep it. But she returns to the bank and meets the man from whose account it was withdrawn.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama wrestles with the ghost of Grandma Crowley when she finds her mother's broach and realizes it could be worth serious money.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama sits in on Vint's poker game when one of his friends has to cancel. After an evening of childhood stories, Vint ends the evening broke and belittled in front of his pals.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and longtime friend Ramon enter a dance competition that Vint and Naomi are contestants in, and nothing is going to stop Mama from winning.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama suspects Bubba and his new study partner are doing more than studying. But, while hiding in Bubba's closet, Mama instead discovers Vint and Naomi's attempts to get pregnant.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Programado para el desastre
programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 anys després de la seva estrena, 'Forensic Files' segueix sent la sèrie de crims reals més exitosa de tots els temps.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Voto de silencio

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Nadie en una tranquila comunidad residencial vio nada inusual el día en que uno de sus vecinos fue brutalmente atacado y asesinado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Obsesión de verano
programme.desc: En un próspero suburbio de Filadelfia, la policía fue llamada a la escena de lo que parecía ser un ahogamiento accidental.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Shep has returned after his sensitivity training and it’s Spirit Week at Degrassi! However spirits are anything but high at home for Jane as she struggles to get her dropout brother Lucas off the couch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Blue asks Holly J to the winter dance in a very romantic way. Only problem? Holly J thinks she might have a thing for her co-worker, Spinner. While Blue is a dreamboat, Spinner is a goofball.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Kevin Smith and Jason Mewes are back! But this time, the Degrassi gang ventures to L.A. via school bus to score parts in Mewesical High, a fictional musical directed by Jason Mewes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Club Fair Day and Alli and Clare sign up for the Photography Club. Watch out Annie Leibovitz! Everyone who’s anyone is getting involved in something – except Johnny.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive has a bad reputation and a knack for running from the law. The pursuit has Dog and team traveling through an urban dystopia of suspicion, false leads and mistrust.

programme.desc: Following Josh Harris' death, Sammy Jo realizes she must let go of Steven; upset by Steven's uncompromising use of power, Fallon drifts further away from her brother; Dana gives the notes of Denver-Carrington's board meeting to Sean.

programme.desc: Sean uses Alexis' bid for governor to gain control of Colbyco; Sammy Jo and Jeff develop a deep friendship from their mutual loneliness; Dana tells Adam he was the father of her aborted baby. As Adams turns to Karen for solace.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: This city spends most of the year encased in ice…but when summer hits, Anchorage bursts into life. Animals and plants living this far north have been forced to adapt, working faster to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: Wild Ocean
programme.desc: Plunge into an underwater feeding frenzy, an epic struggle for survival where whales, sharks, dolphins, seals, gannets and billions of fish collide with mankind during one of nature's greatest migration spectacles.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Although Portugal is a country with a relatively small territory, the difference in landscapes is quite notorious.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Water is a vital element for the survival of all living beings on Planet Earth. From the top of the mountains where the rivers begin to run, to their final destination, we will get to know the animals and landscapes that cross the heart of Wild Portugal.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: The richness of Portugal's coastal waters is amazing. Thousands of creatures live here, both in the water and on land. The Portuguese coast is the ultimate frontier before the Atlantic Ocean.

programme.title: Wild Sardinia
programme.desc: Sardinia has always been the epitome of pure wilderness, an emerald of volcanic origin in the Mediterranean. 1900 metres of coastline and an infinite maze of offshore islands.

programme.title: Wild Skagerrak
programme.desc: The strait that connects the North Sea with the Baltic, with depths of over 700 metres, is notorious for its dangerously strong currents. But currents also mean food and therefore nourishment for the large swarms of fish that inhabit the region.

programme.title: Wild Switzerland
programme.desc: Gentle, green meadows, rugged rock faces, mysterious lakes, dense forests, tall mountains, low-lying river deltas, quietly meandering mountain streams, and smack dab in the middle, a unique fauna - THIS is Switzerland!

programme.title: Wildest Europe

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: An ailing young stranger brings new life to town, but only Dr. Mike can save him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.desc: When the Rev. Johnson finds that his former mentor plans a visit, he borrows money from Hank to fix up his ramshackle church.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: The Big Boss
programme.desc: Bruce Lee faces an underground criminal element after members of his family begin disappearing. Now he must break his vow of non-violence to take on the terrifying "Big Boss."

programme.title: Fist Of Fury
programme.desc: Bruce Lee stars as Chen Zhen, a martial arts protégé who returns to his former school in Shanghai when he learns that his beloved instructor has been murdered. To avenge his master's death, Chen must fight the greatest assassins from a rival school.

programme.title: The Way Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Legendary Bruce Lee's only complete directorial film is packed with action and epic fight scenes. Lee visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: Game of Death
programme.desc: Billy Lo, a champion fighter and movie star, fakes his death to escape and then expose the crime syndicate that wants to control him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman appears to have lost control of her SUV and plunged down an embankment into a shallow creek. But investigators suspect foul play when they find snowy footprints leading away from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace. Even though foul play is suspected, the leads don't pan out and the trail turns cold. Twenty years would pass before police are able to link a clump of hair discovered in an isolated area with the missing woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A surgeon is stabbed to death and the most likely suspect is seen in a restaurant at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
